summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LUMEN public multi-page site restructure. All navigation, forms, and integrations working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/public/contact - header callback source (200, ok:true)
Frontend: Landing page loads without errors
Frontend: Menu overlay [data-testid=public-menu-overlay] displays 7 navigation links
Frontend: /assets page search input [data-testid=assets-search-input] filters cards
Frontend: /assets page grid [data-testid=assets-grid] displays asset cards
Frontend: /calculator page result block [data-testid=calculator-result] displays calculations
Frontend: /contacts page form [data-testid=contacts-name-input, contacts-phone-input] submits successfully
Frontend: /contacts page form shows success message after submission
Frontend: Footer [data-testid=footer-mega] present on all public pages
Frontend: Footer newsletter form [data-testid=footer-newsletter-input, footer-newsletter-submit-button] submits successfully
Frontend: Landing page teaser blocks [data-testid=landing-teaser-0..3] link to dedicated pages
Frontend: /otc page renders with new shell (header + footer)
Frontend: /app page renders with new shell (header + footer)
Frontend: No console crashes or red-screen errors on any page
